domain: Wallace flying frog patagium — webbed toes + skin flaps spread for controlled glide and lift; adhesive toe discs soften landing.
specific_mechanism: Mid-fall spreading of patagia creates drag/lift for controlled descent; sticky toe pads enable safe landing.
llm_application: PATAGIUM-CONF: on high-uncertainty token prediction, emit primary token + small bundle of 'patagia' companion tokens encoding confidence interval (low-bound, expected, high-bound) inline with output stream. Downstream verifier matches against interval — 'adhesive landing' = verifier accepts within interval.
novelty_claim: ConfTuner (NeurIPS 2025) trains verbalized confidence. Interval LLM-Judge (EMNLP 2025). PATAGIUM-CONF inlines companion interval tokens at decode — close to verbalized confidence with interval extension.
